allow: PowerShell(claude mcp add supabase --transport http https://mcp.supabase.com)

PowerShell(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe claude 2>$null; \(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); \(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\))
